product_overview: E-Konsul CRM is a Laravel-based consultation and lead management platform that helps teams capture leads, track consultation progress (notes & reminders), and analyze performance via dashboards and analytics. It includes account and master-data management for administrative control and theme personalization for users.
core_goals: Allow users to authenticate and access a personalized dashboard
Capture, search, filter, edit, and remove consultation leads
Record consultation notes and schedule reminders tied to a consultation
Provide visual analytics and exportable reports to monitor performance
Enable super-admins to manage accounts, master data, and audit logs
Let users customize the application appearance with light/dark mode and primary color

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password; toggle theme on the login screen; submit a developer bug report from a modal.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See dashboard overview
Navigate to /login -> Toggle dark/light theme -> See theme change applied immediately
Navigate to /login -> Open bug report modal -> Fill bug report textarea -> Submit bug report via WhatsApp -> See confirmation that the report was prepared
Navigate to /login -> Open bug report modal -> Leave bug report textarea empty -> Attempt to submit bug report -> See inline validation error indicating description is required

features.name: Leads Management (Consultations)
features.description: Browse, create, edit, delete, import, and export consultation leads with search and filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /consultations -> See list of consultation leads and available filters
Navigate to /consultations -> Open create lead form -> Fill client name -> Fill phone -> Fill location -> Fill product -> Select status -> Submit create form -> See new lead appear in the list
Navigate to /consultations -> Open create lead form -> Leave a required field empty -> Submit create form -> See inline validation error for the missing field
Navigate to /consultations -> Search leads by name, phone, or ID -> Open lead edit form -> Change field values -> Submit edit form -> See updated lead in the list
Navigate to /consultations -> Search leads by name, phone, or ID -> Initiate delete action for a lead -> Confirm deletion -> See lead removed from the list
Navigate to /consultations -> Open import CSV dialog -> Select CSV file -> Confirm import -> See imported leads in the list
Navigate to /consultations -> Initiate export -> Receive downloadable CSV file

features.name: Consultation Notes & Reminders
features.description: View consultation engagement timeline, add chronological notes, and schedule reminders tied to a consultation.
user_flows: Navigate to /consultations -> Open a consultation from the list -> See consultation timeline with notes and reminders
Navigate to /consultations -> Open a consultation from the list -> Open add note input -> Enter note content -> Save note -> See note appear in the timeline

Navigate to /consultations -> Open a consultation from the list -> Open add reminder form -> Set reminder date and time -> Enter reminder description -> Save reminder -> See reminder listed in the consultation timeline
Navigate to /consultations -> Open a consultation from the list -> Open add reminder form -> Leave reminder date empty -> Attempt to save reminder -> See inline validation error for date

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide an overview of key metrics and recent activity so users can quickly assess workload and performance.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See total leads metric -> See follow-ups metric -> See conversions metric -> See recent consultation list
Navigate to / -> See recent consultation list -> Open a recent consultation from the list -> See consultation detail and timeline

features.name: Analytics
features.description: Visualize distributions and trends (product, status, region) over selectable periods and export analytics reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> Toggle period type (weekly/monthly) -> View product distribution chart -> View status distribution chart
Navigate to /analytics -> Toggle period type (weekly/monthly) -> Export analytics to Excel -> Receive Excel file
Navigate to /analytics -> Toggle period type (weekly/monthly) -> Export analytics to PDF -> Receive PDF file

features.name: Theme Customization (Settings)
features.description: Let users switch between light/dark mode and choose a primary color with a live preview and persistent save.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle dark/light mode -> See UI update immediately
Navigate to /settings -> Select a preset color -> See color preview applied live
Navigate to /settings -> Enter a custom hex color -> See color preview applied live
Navigate to /settings -> Apply desired color and mode -> Save theme settings -> See confirmation that settings were saved

features.name: Master Data Management
features.description: Allow administrators to manage core reference data such as consultation categories and status types to keep forms and workflows up to date.
user_flows: Navigate to /master-data -> See lists of categories and statuses
Navigate to /master-data -> Open create status form -> Enter status name -> Save status -> See new status in the list
Navigate to /master-data -> Open edit form for a status -> Change status name -> Save changes -> See updated status in the list
Navigate to /master-data -> Select a status -> Initiate delete action -> Confirm deletion -> See status removed from the list

features.name: Accounts Management (Super Admin)
features.description: Enable super-admins to create and manage accounts and assign users to accounts for scoped data access.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts -> See account list
Navigate to /accounts -> Open create account form -> Fill account name and details -> Save account -> See new account in the list
Navigate to /accounts -> Open an account from the list -> Assign a user to the account -> Confirm assignment -> See user listed under the account

features.name: Audit Logs (Super Admin)
features.description: Provide an immutable chronological record of important data changes so administrators can review what changed, who changed it, and when.
user_flows: Navigate to /audit-logs -> See chronological list of audit entries
Navigate to /audit-logs -> Filter audit entries by date or user -> See filtered results
Navigate to /audit-logs -> Open an audit entry -> See change details including previous and current values

routes.description: User login page with email/password authentication
Leads management listing with create/edit modals
Consultation detail view with notes and reminders
Analytics dashboard with charts and reports
Master data management for categories, statuses, users (super admin only)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials, includes dark/light theme toggle and bug report modal
user_interactions: Toggle dark/light theme with theme switch
Fill bug report textarea in modal
Click 'Kirim Laporan via WhatsApp' to submit bug report
See inline error if bug report textarea is empty

features.name: Leads Management
features.description: View, create, edit, and delete consultation leads with filtering and search
user_interactions: Search leads by name, phone, or ID
Filter by status, account, date range
Click 'Tambah Lead' to open create modal
Fill client name, phone, location, product, status fields
Click edit button on a row to open edit modal
Click delete button to remove a lead

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview dashboard showing key metrics and recent activity
user_interactions: View total leads, follow-ups, conversions stats

features.name: Analytics
features.description: Analytics dashboard with product, status, and regional distribution charts
user_interactions: Export analytics to Excel or PDF

features.name: Theme Customization
features.description: Light/dark theme toggle and primary color customization
user_interactions: Select preset color or enter custom hex color
